metadata.name: staking
metadata.description: Dr Fraudsworth Staking Program - PROFIT staking for SOL yield

instructions.name: claim
docs: Claim pending SOL rewards without unstaking.
Transfers accumulated SOL rewards from escrow to user.
User's staked_balance remains unchanged.
Fails if no rewards to claim.

accounts.name: user
docs: User claiming rewards (receives SOL).

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: Global stake pool state.

accounts.name: user_stake
docs: User's stake account.

accounts.name: escrow_vault
docs: Escrow vault PDA (source of SOL rewards).

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

instructions.name: deposit_rewards
docs: Deposit SOL rewards (called by Tax Program via CPI).
Increments pending_rewards counter. SOL already transferred by caller.
Access restricted to Tax Program via seeds::program constraint.
# Arguments
* `amount` - Amount of SOL deposited in lamports

accounts.name: tax_authority
docs: Tax Program's tax authority PDA.
CRITICAL SECURITY: seeds::program ensures this PDA is derived from Tax Program.
Only Tax Program can produce a valid signer with these seeds.
CROSS-PROGRAM DEPENDENCY:
- TAX_AUTHORITY_SEED must match Tax Program's derivation
- tax_program_id() must match Tax Program's declare_id!
- If either mismatch, deposit_rewards will reject all Tax Program calls

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: Stake pool global state - pending_rewards updated here.

accounts.name: escrow_vault
docs: SOL escrow vault PDA - used for balance reconciliation.
After updating pending_rewards, we verify escrow_vault.lamports() >= pending_rewards.
This catches silent transfer failures or short-changed CPI amounts.
Note: AccountInfo (not SystemAccount) because this PDA was created via `init` in
initialize_stake_pool, making the Staking Program the owner (not system program).

instructions.name: initialize_stake_pool
docs: Initialize the global stake pool with dead stake.
Creates StakePool, EscrowVault, and StakeVault PDAs.
Transfers MINIMUM_STAKE (1 PROFIT) as dead stake to prevent
first-depositor attack.
Can only be called once (Anchor's init constraint prevents re-init).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority who pays for account creation and provides dead stake.
Must own `authority_token_account` with at least MINIMUM_STAKE PROFIT.

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: Global stake pool state PDA.
Seeds: ["stake_pool"]

accounts.name: escrow_vault
docs: Native SOL escrow vault PDA (holds undistributed yield).
Seeds: ["escrow_vault"]
This is a system account, not a token account.

accounts.name: stake_vault
docs: Token-2022 stake vault PDA (holds staked PROFIT tokens).
Seeds: ["stake_vault"]
Authority: stake_pool PDA (so pool can transfer out on unstake)

accounts.name: authority_token_account
docs: Authority's PROFIT token account (source of dead stake).
Must have at least MINIMUM_STAKE tokens.

accounts.name: profit_mint
docs: PROFIT token mint (Token-2022).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program for PROFIT transfers.

accounts.name: program
docs: The Staking program — used to look up its ProgramData address.

accounts.name: program_data
docs: ProgramData account — upgrade_authority must match authority.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

instructions.name: stake
docs: Stake PROFIT tokens to begin earning yield.
Transfers PROFIT from user to stake vault.
Creates UserStake account if first stake.
Updates rewards checkpoint before balance change.

accounts.name: user
docs: User staking tokens.

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: Global stake pool state.

accounts.name: user_stake
docs: User's stake account (created if doesn't exist).
Seeds: ["user_stake", user_pubkey]

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's PROFIT token account (source).

accounts.name: stake_vault
docs: Stake vault PDA (destination).

accounts.name: profit_mint
docs: PROFIT token mint.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

instructions.name: unstake
docs: Unstake PROFIT tokens and auto-claim pending rewards.
Transfers PROFIT from stake vault to user.
Automatically claims any pending SOL rewards.
If partial unstake would leave < MINIMUM_STAKE, does full unstake.

accounts.name: user
docs: User unstaking tokens (receives PROFIT back).

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: Global stake pool state.

accounts.name: user_stake
docs: User's stake account.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's PROFIT token account (destination for unstaked tokens).

accounts.name: stake_vault
docs: Stake vault PDA (source for unstaked tokens).

accounts.name: profit_mint
docs: PROFIT token mint.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

instructions.name: update_cumulative
docs: Finalize epoch rewards (called by Epoch Program via CPI).
Moves pending_rewards to cumulative rewards_per_token_stored.
Access restricted to Epoch Program via seeds::program constraint.
# Arguments
* `epoch` - The epoch number being finalized

accounts.name: epoch_authority
docs: Epoch Program's staking authority PDA.
CRITICAL SECURITY: seeds::program ensures this PDA is derived from Epoch Program.
Only Epoch Program can produce a valid signer with these seeds.
CROSS-PROGRAM DEPENDENCY:
- STAKING_AUTHORITY_SEED must match Epoch Program's derivation
- epoch_program_id() must match Epoch Program's declare_id!
- If either mismatch, update_cumulative will reject all Epoch Program calls

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: Stake pool global state - cumulative and pending updated here.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer does not own this stake account

errors.name: AlreadyUpdated
errors.msg: Cumulative already updated for this epoch

errors.name: CooldownActive
errors.msg: Cooldown active: must wait 12 hours after claiming before unstaking

types.name: Claimed
docs: EVNT-04: Emitted when a user claims SOL rewards.
Separate from unstake - user can claim without changing stake position.

fields.name: user
docs: The user who claimed.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of SOL claimed.

fields.name: staked_balance
docs: User's current staked balance (unchanged by claim).

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: User's lifetime total claimed after this claim.

fields.name: slot
docs: Slot when claim occurred.

types.name: CumulativeUpdated
docs: Emitted when Epoch Program updates cumulative via CPI.
Signals that pending rewards have been added to the global accumulator.

fields.name: epoch
docs: The epoch number that was finalized.

fields.name: rewards_added
docs: Amount of SOL added to cumulative (was pending_rewards).

fields.name: new_cumulative
docs: New rewards_per_token_stored value.

fields.name: total_staked
docs: Total staked at time of update (denominator for calculation).

fields.name: slot
docs: Slot when update occurred.

types.name: EscrowInsufficientAttempt
docs: Emitted when claim fails due to insufficient escrow balance.
This should never happen in normal operation - it indicates a bug
in reward accounting or an external exploit. The event is emitted
before the error is returned so it gets logged even on failure,
enabling monitoring/alerting systems to detect anomalies.

fields.name: user
docs: The user who attempted to claim.

fields.name: requested
docs: Amount of SOL the user tried to claim (lamports).

fields.name: available
docs: Actual SOL balance available in the escrow vault (lamports).

fields.name: slot
docs: Slot when the failed attempt occurred.

types.name: RewardsDeposited
docs: Emitted when Tax Program deposits rewards via CPI.
This is the 71% yield portion from taxed swaps.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of SOL deposited.

fields.name: new_pending
docs: New pending_rewards balance after deposit.

fields.name: escrow_vault
docs: Escrow vault pubkey (for monitoring/filtering).
Enables off-chain dashboards to filter events per vault and verify
the vault address matches expectations without additional RPC calls.

fields.name: escrow_balance
docs: Escrow vault SOL balance at time of deposit (for reconciliation monitoring).
If escrow_balance < new_pending, something is wrong. The on-chain require!
already catches this and reverts, but the event gives visibility into
healthy deposits too.

fields.name: slot
docs: Slot when deposit occurred.

types.name: StakePool
docs: StakePool global singleton.
Seeds: ["stake_pool"]
Size: 62 bytes (8 discriminator + 54 data)

fields.name: total_staked
docs: Total PROFIT currently staked across all users.
Updated on every stake/unstake operation.

fields.name: rewards_per_token_stored
docs: Cumulative rewards per staked token, scaled by PRECISION (1e18).
This value only increases, never decreases.
Used for fair pro-rata reward distribution.

fields.name: pending_rewards
docs: SOL rewards accumulated this epoch, not yet added to cumulative.
Reset to 0 after update_cumulative is called.

fields.name: last_update_epoch
docs: Last epoch when cumulative was updated.
Prevents double-update within same epoch.

fields.name: total_distributed
docs: Total SOL distributed lifetime (analytics).
Incremented when pending_rewards is added to cumulative.

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: Total SOL claimed lifetime (analytics).
Incremented when users claim rewards.

fields.name: initialized
docs: Initialization flag.
Set to true during initialize_stake_pool.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.
Stored for efficient re-derivation during transfers.

types.name: StakePoolInitialized
docs: EVNT-01: Emitted when stake pool is initialized.
Includes vault addresses for indexers to track and timestamp
for initialization timeline.

fields.name: escrow_vault
docs: The SOL escrow vault PDA address.

fields.name: stake_vault
docs: The PROFIT stake vault PDA address.

fields.name: dead_stake_amount
docs: Amount of dead stake deposited (MINIMUM_STAKE).
This is the protocol's initial stake to prevent first-depositor attack.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp from Clock sysvar.

types.name: Staked
docs: EVNT-02: Emitted when a user stakes PROFIT.
Contains all information needed for indexers to track stake activity
without additional RPC lookups.

fields.name: user
docs: The user who staked.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of PROFIT staked in this transaction.

fields.name: new_balance
docs: User's new total staked balance after this stake.

fields.name: total_staked
docs: Pool's new total staked after this stake.

fields.name: slot
docs: Slot when stake occurred.

types.name: Unstaked
docs: EVNT-03: Emitted when a user unstakes PROFIT.
Includes the unstaked amount and any rewards forfeited back to the pool.
Unstake forfeits unclaimed rewards to remaining stakers.

fields.name: user
docs: The user who unstaked.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of PROFIT unstaked in this transaction.

fields.name: rewards_forfeited
docs: Amount of SOL rewards forfeited back to the staking pool.
Redistributed to remaining stakers via pending_rewards.

fields.name: new_balance
docs: User's new staked balance after unstake (may be 0).

fields.name: total_staked
docs: Pool's new total staked after unstake.

fields.name: slot
docs: Slot when unstake occurred.

types.name: UserStake
docs: UserStake per-user account.
Seeds: ["user_stake", user_pubkey]
Size: 105 bytes (8 discriminator + 97 data)

fields.name: owner
docs: Owner of this stake account.
Validated on unstake/claim to prevent unauthorized access.

fields.name: staked_balance
docs: Amount of PROFIT staked.
Updated on stake/unstake operations.

fields.name: rewards_per_token_paid
docs: User's checkpoint of rewards_per_token at last update.
Used to calculate pending rewards since last interaction.

fields.name: rewards_earned
docs: Accumulated rewards not yet claimed.
Updated by update_rewards helper before any balance change.

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: Total SOL claimed lifetime (analytics).
Incremented on each claim.

fields.name: first_stake_slot
docs: Slot when user first staked.
Set once on first stake, never updated.

fields.name: last_update_slot
docs: Slot when user last interacted (stake/unstake/claim).
Updated by update_rewards helper.

fields.name: last_claim_ts
docs: Unix timestamp of user's last claim.
Used for cooldown gate: unstake blocked until COOLDOWN_SECONDS after last claim.
0 = never claimed (no cooldown applies).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.
Stored for efficient re-derivation.
